_meta.description: Schema for code-review-excludes.json — default exclude patterns consulted by /code-review Step 3. Each category lists directory names (not glob patterns) that should be excluded when discovering source files.

categories.description: Exclude categories. Order is informational; consumers should flatten all categories into a single set of excludes, filtered by env where applicable.

directories.description: Directory names or trailing-slash paths to exclude.

env.description: Environment filter. Omitted = 'both' (applies in all consumers). 'dev' = only when running in idpf-praxis-dev (framework repo itself). 'deployed' = only when running in user projects via Praxis Hub Manager.
